'''talaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swachh|swachh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swachh|swachh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| talaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tælægæth|tælægæth]] || [[word:tælægæj|tælægæj]] || [[word:tælægæsh|tælægæsh]] || [[word:tælægæ|tælægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:talalagath|talalagath]] || [[word:talalagaj|talalagaj]] || [[word:talalagash|talalagash]] || [[word:talalaga|talalaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:talagath|talagath]] || [[word:talagaj|talagaj]] || [[word:talagash|talagash]] || [[word:talaga|talaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:talafgath|talafgath]] || [[word:talafgaj|talafgaj]] || [[word:talafgash|talafgash]] || [[word:talafgaf|talafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:talagatha|talagatha]] || [[word:talagaja|talagaja]] || [[word:talagasha|talagasha]] || [[word:talagaka|talagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:talagath|talagath]] || [[word:talagaj|talagaj]] || [[word:talagash|talagash]] || [[word:talaga|talaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:talagathal|talagathal]] || [[word:talagajal|talagajal]] || [[word:talagashal|talagashal]] || [[word:talagakal|talagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:talagathatha|talagathatha]] || [[word:talagajaja|talagajaja]] || [[word:talagashasha|talagashasha]] || [[word:talagaka|talagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:talagathan|talagathan]] || [[word:talagajan|talagajan]] || [[word:talagashan|talagashan]] || [[word:talagakan|talagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:talagathaoro|talagathaoro]] || [[word:talagajaoro|talagajaoro]] || [[word:talagashaoro|talagashaoro]] || [[word:talagakaoro|talagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
